node.statement: (Multi-constraint induction — Weis-Shirokov Corollary 5). Under m constraints C = {x ∈ K : f_j(x) ≤ β_j (or = β_j), j = 1,...,m}: dim(F_K(x)) ≤ dim(F_C(x)) + m. Proof: Apply the single-constraint result iteratively. Define K_0 = K, K_1 = {x ∈ K_0 : f_1(x) ≤ β_1}, ..., K_m = C. At each step: dim(F_{K_{i-1}}(x)) ≤ dim(F_{K_i}(x)) + 1. Summing (telescoping): dim(F_K(x)) = dim(F_{K_0}(x)) ≤ dim(F_{K_m}(x)) + m = dim(F_C(x)) + m.
